welcome: 👋 Welcome to ArchiveBot! 🤖 Your Intelligent Personal Archive Assistant Core Features: 📦 Universal Archiving - Text/Images/Videos/Documents/Links 🏷️ Smart Tags - Auto-classification & tag extraction 🤖 AI Enhanced - Summarization/Key points/Smart titles 🔍 Powerful Search - Full-text/Tag filtering/Time range 💾 Flexible Storage - Telegram channel + Database backup 📝 Notes Management - Linked archives/Standalone/AI assist 🗑️ Safe Operations - Trash bin/Backup/Export formats Quick Start: • Send any content to archive • Use #hashtags for custom tags • Send /help for complete command list Open Source: ⭐ GitHub: https://github.com/tealun/ArchiveBot Let's start archiving! 🚀
help: 📖 Help Archive Content: • Send me any content directly • Add tags using #tag format • Forward messages to record source • Batch forwarding auto-aggregation Basic Commands: /start - Initialize bot /help - View this help /search (/s) <keyword> - Search archives /tags (/t) - View all tags /stats (/st) - View statistics /review - Archive review & stats /rand (/r) - Random review Notes: /note (/n) - Add note to archive /notes - View all notes Data Management: /trash - View trash bin /export - Export data (JSON/Markdown/CSV) /backup - Backup & restore database System Settings: /setting (/set) - Configure system /ai - AI status /language (/la) - Change language Search Tips: • Keyword: /s python • Tag: /s #tech • Combined: /s #tech python • Click results to jump to channel AI Features: • Smart summary generation • Auto extract key points • Tag suggestions (batch shared) • Intelligent categorization
unauthorized:
⛔ Unauthorized

Sorry, this bot is for private use only.
search_no_keyword:
Please provide search keyword.

Example: /search python

Please provide search keyword.

Example: /search python
tags_empty:
No tags yet.

Start archiving content to create tags!
rate_limit_exceeded:
⚠️ Rate limit exceeded

Please wait {wait_time} seconds before trying again.
optimizer_search_suggestions:
💡 Suggestions:
• Try simpler keywords
• Check for typos
• Use /tags to browse by tags
• Use /stats to see what's in your archive
optimizer_filter_suggestions_with_tags: 💡 {count} results found. Try filtering by tags: {tags}
optimizer_expand_suggestions: 💡 Want more? Try broader keywords or check /tags
optimizer_onboarding_hint: 📝 Your archive is empty. Start by forwarding messages or sending content!
optimizer_tagging_hint: 💡 Tip: Add hashtags when archiving for better organization!
optimizer_resource_suggestions: 💡 Try again? Send 'one more' to get more resources
command_guide_note: 💡 Use /note <archive_id> or reply to archive message to add notes
command_guide_trash: 💡 Use /trash to view trash bin (deleted archives can be restored or permanently deleted here)
command_guide_export: 💡 Use /export to export data (JSON/Markdown/CSV formats supported)
command_guide_backup: 💡 Use /backup to backup or restore database
command_guide_tags: 💡 Use /tags to view all tags, or send #tag to filter

trash_invalid_command:
❌ Invalid command

Usage:
/trash - View trash
/trash restore <id> - Restore archive
/trash delete <id> - Delete permanently
/trash empty [days] - Empty trash

❌ Failed to delete archive #{archive_id}

Archive may already be deleted.

ai_status_unavailable:
⚠️ Service: Unavailable
Please check API key configuration
ai_status_enable_guide:
💡 *How to Enable*
1. Edit config/config.yaml
2. Set ai.enabled: true
3. Configure ai.api.provider and ai.api.api_key
4. Restart the bot

Supported providers: OpenAI, Claude, Qwen
note_mode_enter: 📝 Note Mode Activated Please send your note content: • 💬 Text message • 🖼️ Image • 🎤 Voice 💡 You can also reply to an archive message to link the note Send /cancel to exit note mode
note_mode_archive_linked: 📝 Note Mode Activated 📎 Linked to Archive #{archive_id} Please send your note content: • 💬 Text message • 🖼️ Image • 🎤 Voice Send /cancel to exit note mode

ai_chat_help:
🤖 AI Assistant Features:

• Smart Chat: Tell me what you want to know
• Search Archives: Find content by topic
• View Stats: Check archive statistics
• Content Analysis: Deep dive into your archives
• Exit: Send 'exit' to end session

Note: Session expires after 10 minutes of inactivity
